$comment: WS33 audit gate 7 — env.example <-> getter drift checks. agent-research is a Node service; src/env.ts consolidates every process.env read via the Zod EnvSchema. .env.example documents the same set of keys. We fail on silent landmines (read in code but missing from .env.example) only — .env.example intentionally documents a couple of keys with defaults (PORT, LOG_LEVEL) that are also read, and any forward-looking keys that are not yet wired.
